hero_subtitle: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into one audit-ready, scalable workflow that strengthens regulatory readiness and visibility across digital asset compliance operations.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_description: Executive teams lack a consolidated view of compliance workflows, creating blind spots across regulatory obligations and operational risk. This limits confidence in audit readiness, bank due diligence and consistent oversight of multi-jurisdictional rules and cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects multi-jurisdictional rules, provider outputs, case workflows and evidence into a single compliance layer, enabling leadership to monitor regulatory readiness with clear audit and due diligence visibility.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to regulatory readiness
workflow_description: SFTY links compliance checks, regulatory updates and case decisions into a controlled workflow that strengthens audit evidence and supports operational risk control.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another provider. The compliance control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a provider-neutral layer that connects fragmented compliance outputs into workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence for clearer regulatory readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports crypto businesses with scalable compliance workflows, audit-ready cases, provider orchestration and deployment controls designed for regulatory readiness and bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for crypto executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides crypto executives a connected compliance control layer to reduce operational risk, improve auditability, enhance regulatory readiness, and deliver clear visibility across compliance workflows and case management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support regulatory workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures regulatory workflows by connecting provider outputs, routing reviews, managing cases, applying internal rules, and tracking regulatory changes to support consistent compliance decisions and scalable operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, evidence packages and regulatory change records to support audit-ready, defensible compliance documentation for internal and external review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, consolidating their outputs into one operational compliance workflow without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured reviews, cases, evidence and reporting to support compliance teams and leadership oversight.
final_title: Turn regulatory workflows into audit-ready cases
final_description: Explore how SFTY helps executives connect provider outputs into scalable compliance workflows and prepare for regulatory readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
